title: Visual Notes Magnifier
html_prompt: Create a single-file HTML/CSS/JS preview for an EC LAB visual notes page with an interactive glass magnifier. Preserve the final design structure: a quiet warm-gray full-screen canvas, duplicated content layers, a circular clipped magnified layer that follows pointer/touch movement, a frosted physical lens with etched conic tick marks, circular SVG text, glass refraction shadows, subtle grid lines, dotted texture, editorial hero typography, mono metadata, and a floating circular music button. Use EC LAB / ec 的实验室 / Visual Notes / AI Workflow / Design / Prompt / Code / Inspiration / Record. Explore. Share. as the content. Do not use external assets, external images, CDN, frameworks, Google Fonts, custom font files, real brands, watermarks, authors, or platform names. Build all visuals with HTML, CSS, SVG, gradients, clip-path, masks, blur, shadows, backdrop-filter, pseudo-elements, and text. Use only EC font sets and EC radius tokens. Make it responsive.

css.--font-sans: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif
css.--font-cn: "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "Noto Sans SC", system-ui, sans-serif
